Craft beer, famous waffle fries, seitan wings, lucky burger. Cocktails: sour cherry lemontini, sazerac. Neighborhood bar since 2008. Happy hour menu: https://www.lucky13pub.com/menus

name: Green Elephant
description: * HH: Mon-Fri 4:00 PM-6:00 PM* espresso martini bar (lots of different options) Deals (Mon-Fri 4-6 PM): half-priced cocktails including 11+ varieties of their signature espresso martinis (banana-cream pudding, classic, etc) plus elevated New American small plates. Velvet-draped Rittenhouse lounge by Teddy Sourias - Philly's first espresso martini bar. Note: 'Green Elephant' is the seasonal St. Patrick's version of The Elephant. Happy hour menu: https://www.elephantphilly.com/

name: El Vez
description: * HH: Mon-Fri 3:00 PM-6:00 PM* big interior Deals (Mon-Fri 3-6 PM): margaritas (Frozen Blood Orange, Pink Cadillac, Golden Gloves), tequila flights, plus snacks. Stephen Starr Mex-Eclectic spot with one of Philly's largest tequila selections, vintage photo booth, lively party vibe. Happy hour menu: https://www.elvezrestaurant.com/

name: Static
description: * cool bar playing movies on projectors

name: Homegrown 215
description: South Philly neighborhood breakfast & lunch cafe (also Callowhill location). Bean2bean coffee, free WiFi, full breakfast/lunch menu, seasonal Frobo blended drinks. Open Mon-Fri 7 AM-4 PM, Sat-Sun 8 AM-4 PM - daytime cafe only, no bar/happy hour.

name: Juana Tamala
description: Vibrant neon-colored Mexican BYOB on East Passyunk from Chef Jennifer Zavala (Top Chef). Famous for queso birria tacos and birria ramen with rich dipping consomme - plus vegan birria tacos, handmade Oaxacan tamales, seitan wings, and churros. 20% student discount. Closed Mondays. No traditional happy hour (BYOB).

name: Noir
description: * HH: Mon-Fri 5:00 PM-7:00 PM* Deals (Mon-Fri 5-7 PM): $7 wines (Pinot Grigio, Chardonnay, Cabernet, Merlot), $3 off all appetizers, plus rotating $5 happy-hour specials. Italian-French restaurant with a Montreal twist from Chef Marco DeCotiis - 50-seat dining room on East Passyunk's restaurant row with seasonal cocktails, full craft beer list, and lunch/dinner daily.

name: Stogie Joe's Tavern
description: Deals: $2 Lions Head, $5 PBR + Beam/Old Grandad/Wild Turkey shot. Happy hour days/times per their Instagram (not all-day) — see Website / Menu link. Famous South Philly pizza, wings, chicken cutlet sandwich. Diners Drive-Ins & Dives. Happy hour menu: https://www.instagram.com/p/DXZcDgkk7dy/

name: Ember and Ash
description: * HH: Mon-Fri 5:00 PM-7:00 PM* Deals (Mon-Fri 5-7 PM): $1 off all draft beer, $2 off all wine by the glass, $6 Prosecco, $10 half dozen oysters, plus rotating food specials. Wood-fire kitchen on Passyunk - octopus, lamb ribs, ember burger, beef shin with green curry sauce. Open Wed-Sun (closed Mon-Tue). Happy hour menu: https://emberandashphilly.com/menus/

name: Superette
description: French-inspired wine bar + bottle shop + epicerie at 1538 E Passyunk (former Primal Supply space) from the team behind Superfolie and Good King Tavern. Curated French wines, charcuterie/cheese boards, comte ravioli, parsley-soaked octopus, merguez, and the famous black olive tapenade to-go. Hours: Tue-Thu 12-8, Fri-Sat 12-10, Sun 11-7. Closed Mondays.

name: Tiffin Indian cuisine
description: South Philly outpost of Munish Narula's mini-chain bringing North Indian cuisine (curries, tandoor naan, samosas, chaats) to 9+ locations across the region. Full bar with happy hour listed by OpenTable but specific deals not published online - call ahead. BYO wine welcome with corkage. Open daily until 10-11 PM.

name: Pho 75
description: South Philly's iconic Vietnamese pho shop in the Wing Phat Plaza strip mall - look for the big yellow banner. Short menu, steaming bowls of rich aromatic broth, tender beef cuts (eye-round, flank, brisket, tendon, tripe, meatballs), plus fresh herbs and sprouts. Open daily 9 AM-8 PM. No bar/happy hour - cash-friendly comfort food.

name: Garage
description: * HH: Mon-Fri 5:00 PM-7:00 PM* Deals (Mon-Fri 5-7 PM): $1 off drafts plus $5 'phatties' menu (Bacon Mac N Cheese, Vietnamese Banh Mi, Duck Fat Burger, Peking Duck). 300+ canned beers, pool, skeeball. Right between Pat's and Geno's - BYO cheesesteaks encouraged. Happy hour menu: https://garagepassyunk.com/

name: Happy Birthday Bar
description: South Philly dive (Ray's Happy Birthday Bar) - an 85-year-old 'everybody knows your name' neighborhood spot at Passyunk & Federal, around the corner from Pat's and Geno's. Free cake-flavored vodka shot on your birthday (ID required), karaoke Fridays at 9 PM with DJ Lars. Cheap drinks, eclectic decor. CASH ONLY (ATM inside). Open 7 AM-2 AM Mon-Sat, 9 AM-2 AM Sun. No formal HH but drinks always cheap.

name: Casablanca Mediterranean grill
description: Family-run Moroccan/Mediterranean grill in the former Bitar's space near the Italian Market from Walid and Tala Baruki. Shawarma, falafel, silky hummus, lamb tagine, Moroccan chicken plus a lovely attached market with Middle Eastern groceries and Soumaya & Sons pita. Now has a full bar (no longer BYOB). Hours Mon-Thu 2-10, Fri-Sat 12-10. No published happy hour specials - call to confirm.

name: Agricola
description: Tiny South Philly pizza + cocktail spot at 10th & Federal (former SliCE Pizza space) from Aaron Gordon of 13th Street Cocktails. Thin-crust 14-inch pies ($14-$18) made with house-milled local wheat & farro and housemade duck prosciutto; all available gluten-free. Owner Aaron mixes complimentary mocktails (free booze add) and runs pizza-making classes. Outdoor seating, honey lavender gelato, BYOB. Open Thu-Sun. 'More product-focused than profit' - 100 pies a night max.

name: The Dive
description: * HH: Everyday 5PM-7PM* Deals (5-7 PM daily): $3 drafts, $6 Citywides (PBR + Jim Beam shot). CASH ONLY, no ATM inside - bring $20 cash. Classic Queen Village dive bar, friendly regulars, dog-friendly, open every day 5pm-2am. Happy hour menu: https://www.facebook.com/diveqv/

name: Royal Tavern
description: * HH: Mon-Fri 4:00 PM-6:00 PM* Deals (Mon-Fri 4-6 PM): 1/2 price drafts, $3 well drinks. Famous Royal Burger ($15 single / $22 double) with smoked gouda, caramelized onions, bacon, chili mayo, pickled long hots on potato roll - also smoked beef round sandwich, vegan options. Open 'til 1am. Happy hour menu: https://royaltavern.com/

name: Grace and Proper
description: * HH: Mon-Mon 8:00 PM-11:59 PM* Deals - 'M For Monday' HH (Mon 8 PM-midnight): rotating bevs and small bites all $8 or under (Phil Mag Best of Philly 2024). Bella Vista vintage European corner cafe/bar with a Portuguese-inspired tapas menu, obscure spirits, and one of Philly's longest wine/cocktail lists. Signature 'Good Giving & Game' uses saffron-infused gin + 24k gold leaf. Walk-in only, kitchen open 'til midnight. Closed Tuesdays.

name: Saloon restaurant
description: Family-owned upscale Italian since 1967 in Bella Vista - one of Philly's most legendary old-school spots. Dark oak paneling, brass accents, vintage antiques, and two dining rooms each with their own bar. Famous for steaks, veal chops, fried long hot peppers, grilled octopus, and Dover sole. House-made desserts and gelatos. FREE parking. Dinner only Mon-Sat 5-9:30 PM, closed Sunday. No happy hour - jacket-and-tie upscale dining.

name: Assembly rooftop
description: * HH: Sun-Thu 4:00 PM-6:00 PM* Deals (Sun-Thu 4-6 PM): $10 cocktails, $6 featured beer, $9 wine, $10 flatbreads. Rooftop bar at The Logan Hotel - panoramic city views. Happy hour menu: https://assemblyrooftop.com/menus/

name: Stratus Lounge
description: * HH: Thu-Fri 5:00 PM-8:00 PM* Deals (Thu-Sat 5-8 PM): $5 call drinks, house wines, select bubbly, and specialty cocktails; half-price flatbreads + snacks (kettle popcorn, pretzels); half-price bottles. Kimpton Hotel Monaco rooftop lounge with Liberty Bell view; reservations recommended. Happy hour menu: https://www.stratuslounge.com/

name: Mug Coffee
description: * Lots of sun, outdoor seating, packed with cute dogs

name: Kanella Grill
description: * Greek place, outdoor seating with lots of sun * Emily recommends. Good dips

name: Mish Mish
description: * HH: Sun, Mon, Thu, Fri, Sat 5:00 PM-7:00 PM* Deals - 'Sunshine Hour' (Thu-Mon 5-7 PM, outdoor sidewalk only, weather permitting): $10 'sunshine wines' from across the Mediterranean, $8 snacks (marinated olives, grilled potatoes with anchovy or vegetarian mayo, sourdough toast with tomato butter). Chef Alex Tewfik's Mediterranean. Closed Tue-Wed. Happy hour menu: https://www.mishmishphilly.com/menus

name: The Dutch
description: * HH: Sun, Wed, Thu 5:00 PM-7:00 PM* Deals (Wed/Thu/Sun 5-7 PM): $5 local brews, $6 bartender's cocktail, $7 house wine (red/white/sparkling), $5 Chow Chow Pickles & House-Cut Fries, $7 Fond's Chicken Liver Mousse, $7 Cheesesteak Tater Tots, $7 Country-Style Paté, $7 Dutch Queso Dip. Modern Pennsylvania Dutch fusion. Also daily brunch 8am-3pm. Happy hour menu: https://www.thedutchphilly.com/menus

name: Topside Tavern
description:
* HH: Mon-Thu 4:00 PM-6:30 PM* Rooftop lounge
* https://www.instagram.com/reel/DUbtLzJkjhY/?igsh=azN1cGc1eGwxcXc2 Deals (Mon-Thu 4-6:30 PM + late-night Thu/Fri 9-11 PM): 1/2 off burgers, crispy brussels sprouts, wings; $10 Red Curry Duck Bao Bun; cocktails $10-13 (City of Spice Margarita, Market Street Manhattan, Topside Old Fashioned); drafts $7-8. Plus Margarita Monday $7 all day, Taco Tuesday $4 tacos. Happy hour menu: https://topsidetavern.com/happy-hour-menu/

name: Vernick Fish
description: * HH: Sun-Thu 4:30 PM-6:30 PM* 'Social Hour' (Sun-Thu 4:30-6:30 PM): discounted raw bar (oysters, shrimp cocktail), small plates (broiled oysters, blackened shrimp, octopus), plus cocktails and wine. James Beard chef Greg Vernick's American oyster bar in the Four Seasons / Comcast Tech Center. Happy hour menu: https://www.vernickfish.com/menus
